popularStory.headline: Grey, Sir John De  story
popularStory.description: When John 7th Lord Ferrers of Groby Grey was born in 1432 in Groby, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir, was 17 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 14. He married ELIZABETH WOODVILLE WYDEVILLE in 1454 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Grey於1432年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，他的父親Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby17歲，母親Elizabeth De Ferrers14歲。他於1452年與Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1450年登記服兵役。他去世於1461年2月17日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年29歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特福藍普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Grey于1432年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，他的父亲Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby17岁，母亲Elizabeth De Ferrers14岁。他于1452年与Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1450年登记服兵役。他去世于1461年2月17日在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年29岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特福藍普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Grey was born in 1432, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, his father, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, was 17 and his mother, Elizabeth De Ferrers, was 14. He married Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England in 1452, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1450. He died on 17 February 1461, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Frampton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Grey est né en 1432, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Ferrers, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England en 1452, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1450. Il est décédé le 17 février 1461, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Frampton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Grey 1432 in Groby, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby 17 und seine Mutter Elizabeth De Ferrers 14. Er hat 1452 in Groby, Leicestershire, England Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1450 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 17. Februar 1461 im Alter von 29 Jahren in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Frampton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Grey è nato il nel 1432 nel Groby, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth De Ferrers, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England nel 1452, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1450. Morì il 17 febbraio 1461, nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Frampton, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Greyが1432年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Grobyは17歳，母Elizabeth De Ferrersは14歳であった。1452年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでElizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1450年に兵役登録をした。彼は1461年2月17日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで29歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトフランプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Grey(이)가 1432년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth De Ferrers(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1452년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1450년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1461년 2월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 프램프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Grey nasceu em 1432, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Ferrers, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England em 1452, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1450. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1461, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Frampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Grey родился в 1432 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Ferrers, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England в 1452 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1450 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 17 февраля 1461 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности фрамптон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Grey nació en 1432, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Ferrers, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England en 1452, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1450. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1461, en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Frampton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
